Obsessed (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $68,261,644Details
International Box Office $5,703,069
Worldwide Box Office $73,964,713
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,571,295
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,159,864
Total $23,731,159
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,612,730 (41.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.39 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:92.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,541 opening theaters/2,634 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $108,854,574

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 24th, 2009 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: August 4th, 2009 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual material including some suggestive dialogue, some violence and thematic content
Running Time: 108 minutes
Plot point: Relationships Gone Wrong, Sexual Harassment, Unrequited Love
Subgenre: Erotic Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Rainforest Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
